description_long: This is a low-top, white canvas sneaker with a classic silhouette, featuring a rounded rubber toe cap and a white rubber sole with a red stripe running along the edge. The shoe has metal eyelets for laces, though the laces are missing, and a fabric tongue with a visible 'Converse All Star' label in red and blue. The heel area is reinforced and displays a printed logo on the rubber outsole. The interior is lined with a light-colored fabric, and the shoe shows some signs of wear, particularly on the midsole and heel. The overall design is iconic and casual, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A white, low-top canvas sneaker with a rubber toe cap, red accent stripe, and visible 'Converse All Star' branding. The shoe is lightly worn and lacks laces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white canvas upper, red stripe on the sole, and missing laces.
description_view_1: Front angle highlighting the rounded rubber toe cap, tongue with 'Converse All Star' label, and empty eyelets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the clean canvas upper and red accent stripe, with the heel slightly visible.
description_view_3: Rear angle showing the reinforced heel, interior lining, and the 'All Star' logo on the rubber outsole.
attribute_logo: Rectangular 'Converse All Star' logo on the tongue in red and blue; 'All Star' text on the heel in gray.
attribute_lacing_style: no laces (eyelets present for standard criss-cross lacing)
